blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: BRUH.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: I know what time it is. You ready?

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I'm eating.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Eat faster. Bruh today is the day. You feel that? TODAY.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: Feel what exactly.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: The energy. Mr. Tanaka already driving, I got the window down, it's perfect outside. This is our year bro. Lincoln High. We been waiting on this.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: You've been waiting on this.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: We. I said we. Don't do that.

blocks.speaker: Larry Jr.
blocks.content: Is that Jonathan?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Is that my boy Junior?? LJ Jr. what's good bruh!

blocks.speaker: Larry Jr.
blocks.content: He said bruh.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I know.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Aye Junior tell your brother to stop being in his head. It's a first day, not a court case.

blocks.speaker: Larry Jr.
blocks.content: Larry. Stop being in your head.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: You're not helping.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Aye for real though. Meet me at the front steps. Don't go in without me.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: What if I get there first?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: You won't. But if you do — just stand there. Don't look lost. Stand like you're waiting for somebody important.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I am waiting for somebody important.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Exactly! See? You already got it. Aight I'm pulling up — let's go.
Before he hung up—
